title: Rich, Smoky Double-Rise Dutch Natto Bread
description: A show-off Dutch dish featuring natto, double-rise-bread, low-calorie-friendly, served in a slate tile vessel.
instructions: Mix 540g all-purpose flour, 120g whole wheat flour, and 20g active dry yeast in a large bowl
Add 1g salt and mix until combined
Gradually add 350ml lukewarm water while mixing
Knead dough for 10 minutes until smooth
Place dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate overnight
In the morning, punch down the dough and let it rest for 1 hour
Divide dough into 2 equal portions and shape into balls
Place balls onto a lightly floured surface and let rise for 1 hour
Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes
Mix 170g instant natto with 10ml water and 5g salt
Once bread is cool, slice in half lengthwise and spread natto mixture on the inside of the bread
Assemble the bread and serve in a slate tile vessel
